name: Apple
description: Consumer electronics and software company headquartered in Cupertino, designing iPhone, Mac, and services used by billions worldwide.

name: Google
description: Search, cloud computing, and advertising technology company headquartered in Mountain View with major offices across the Bay Area.

name: Nvidia
description: GPU and AI chip designer headquartered in Santa Clara, powering gaming, data centers, and autonomous vehicles.

name: TikTok
description: Short-form video platform with U.S. operations based in San Jose, owned by ByteDance.

name: Intuit
description: Financial software company headquartered in Mountain View, maker of TurboTax, QuickBooks, and Credit Karma.

name: Palo Alto Networks
description: Cybersecurity company headquartered in Santa Clara, providing firewall, cloud security, and threat intelligence products.

name: Tesla
description: Electric vehicle and clean energy manufacturer headquartered in Austin with a major factory in Fremont.

name: Amazon
description: E-commerce, cloud computing, and logistics company with engineering offices in the Bay Area and fulfillment centers across the region.

name: Stanford University
description: Private research university in Stanford employing faculty, researchers, and staff across medicine, engineering, and the humanities.

name: Stanford Health Care
description: Academic medical center affiliated with Stanford University, operating hospitals and clinics across Santa Clara County.

name: Santa Clara Valley Healthcare
description: County-operated public health system serving Santa Clara County through Valley Medical Center and a network of community clinics.

name: El Camino Health
description: Nonprofit hospital system operating campuses in Mountain View and Los Gatos, serving the western Santa Clara Valley.

name: Kaiser Permanente
description: Integrated managed care organization operating hospitals and medical offices across Northern California.

name: Sutter Health
description: Nonprofit health system operating 24 hospitals and over 200 clinics across Northern California.

name: Alameda Health System
description: County public health system serving Alameda County through Highland Hospital and community wellness centers.

name: Hayward Unified School District
description: Public school district serving Hayward with 30+ schools and over 20,000 students from pre-K through 12th grade.

name: Oakland Unified School District
description: Public school district operating 80+ schools serving over 34,000 students in Oakland.

name: University of California, Berkeley
description: Public research university and flagship UC campus, one of the largest employers in the East Bay.

name: PG&E
description: Pacific Gas and Electric Company, the primary electric and natural gas utility serving Northern and Central California.

name: Abbott Laboratories
description: Global medical device and diagnostics manufacturer with facilities in the East Bay producing testing and monitoring products.

name: BART
description: Bay Area Rapid Transit, the regional heavy rail system connecting San Francisco, the East Bay, and South Bay.

name: AC Transit
description: Alameda-Contra Costa Transit District operating bus service across the East Bay and transbay routes to San Francisco.

name: Bio-Rad Laboratories
description: Life science research and clinical diagnostics company headquartered in Hercules, manufacturing instruments and reagents.

name: C&H Sugar
description: Sugar refinery operating in Crockett since 1906, processing raw cane sugar for consumer and industrial use.

name: Golden Gate Sign Company
description: Custom sign and architectural fabrication company based in Oakland serving commercial and municipal clients.

name: St. Rose Hospital
description: Community hospital in Hayward providing emergency, surgical, and outpatient services to southern Alameda County.

name: Superior Mechanical Services
description: Commercial HVAC and mechanical contracting firm serving the East Bay with installation and maintenance services.

name: Service Champions
description: Residential HVAC and plumbing service company operating across the East Bay and South Bay.

name: Rivers Plumbing Heating & Air
description: Family-owned plumbing and HVAC company serving Pleasanton and the Tri-Valley area.

name: John Muir Health
description: Nonprofit health system operating medical centers in Walnut Creek and Concord, serving Contra Costa County.

name: Chevron
description: Multinational energy corporation headquartered in San Ramon with a major refinery in Richmond.

name: Bank of America Technology Center
description: Technology operations hub in the East Bay supporting Bank of America's digital banking and infrastructure platforms.

name: Meta
description: Social media and virtual reality company headquartered in Menlo Park, operating Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp.

name: University of California, San Francisco
description: Public research university focused on health sciences, operating hospitals, research labs, and clinics across San Francisco.

name: Genentech
description: Pioneer biotechnology company in South San Francisco developing medicines for cancer, immunology, and rare diseases.

name: Visa
description: Global payments technology company headquartered in San Francisco, processing electronic fund transfers worldwide.

name: Uber
description: Ride-hailing and delivery platform headquartered in San Francisco, operating in cities worldwide.

name: Accenture
description: Global professional services firm with Bay Area offices providing technology consulting, strategy, and managed services.

name: Gilead Sciences
description: Biopharmaceutical company headquartered in Foster City, developing antiviral therapies including HIV and hepatitis treatments.

name: Truebeck Construction
description: Commercial general contractor based in Redwood City specializing in tech campus, healthcare, and life science facility construction.

name: Providence
description: Nonprofit health system operating hospitals in Santa Rosa and the North Bay as part of a 52-hospital network across the western U.S.

name: County of Sonoma
description: County government providing public safety, health, social services, and land use administration for Sonoma County residents.

name: Graton Resort & Casino
description: Casino and resort in Rohnert Park operated by the Federated Indians of Graton Rancheria, the largest employer in Sonoma County's hospitality sector.

name: Jackson Family Wines
description: Family-owned wine company based in Santa Rosa, producing wines from over 40 estate vineyards across California and Oregon.

name: Stark Reality Restaurants
description: Restaurant group operating multiple dining concepts in downtown Santa Rosa.

name: Medtronic
description: Global medical technology company with a Santa Rosa campus producing cardiac rhythm management and surgical innovation products.

name: Napa Valley Unified School District
description: Public school district serving the city of Napa and surrounding areas with 30 schools and approximately 17,000 students.

name: Adventist Health
description: Faith-based health system operating St. Helena Hospital and clinics in the Napa Valley.

name: Constellation Brands
description: Fortune 500 beverage company producing wines, beer, and spirits, with Napa Valley wine operations including Robert Mondavi Winery.

name: Trinchero Family Estates
description: Family-owned winery in St. Helena known for Sutter Home and Trinchero Napa Valley brands.

name: Duckhorn Wine Company
description: Luxury wine producer based in St. Helena, crafting Napa Valley wines across multiple estate labels.

name: Auberge Resorts
description: Luxury hotel and resort collection headquartered in Napa Valley, operating boutique properties worldwide.

name: Culinary Institute of America
description: Premier culinary arts college operating a campus at Greystone in St. Helena with teaching restaurants and continuing education programs.

name: City of Napa
description: Municipal government providing public safety, infrastructure, and community services for the city of Napa.

name: NorthBay Healthcare
description: Nonprofit health system operating NorthBay Medical Center in Fairfield and VacaValley Hospital in Vacaville.

name: Vallejo City Unified School District
description: Public school district serving Vallejo with 23 schools and approximately 12,000 students.

name: General Dynamics
description: Defense contractor operating the Mare Island facility in Vallejo for ship maintenance and advanced manufacturing.

name: Genentech Vacaville
description: Large-scale biologics manufacturing campus in Vacaville producing Genentech's therapeutic antibody medicines.

name: Lonza
description: Swiss pharmaceutical contract manufacturer operating a biologics production facility in Vacaville.

name: Thermo Fisher Scientific
description: Life science instruments and reagents company with manufacturing and R&D operations in the Solano County area.

name: La Clinica de La Raza
description: Federally qualified community health center providing primary care and behavioral health services to underserved populations in the East Bay and Solano County.

name: Partnership HealthPlan of California
description: Nonprofit managed care plan administering Medi-Cal benefits for over 600,000 members across Northern California counties.

name: University of California, Santa Cruz
description: Public research university in Santa Cruz known for programs in computer science, marine biology, and astrophysics.

name: County of Santa Cruz
description: County government providing health, social services, public works, and public safety for Santa Cruz County.

name: Dominican Hospital
description: Community hospital in Santa Cruz operated by CommonSpirit Health, providing acute care and specialty services.

name: Joby Aviation
description: Electric vertical takeoff and landing aircraft developer based in Santa Cruz, building air taxis for urban mobility.

name: Graniterock
description: Construction and building materials company based in Watsonville, providing aggregates, concrete, and paving across Central California.

name: Driscoll's
description: World's largest berry company, headquartered in Watsonville, growing and distributing strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries.

name: Pajaro Valley Unified School District
description: Public school district serving Watsonville and the Pajaro Valley with approximately 18,000 students.

name: Marin General Hospital
description: Community hospital in Greenbrae providing acute care, emergency, and specialty services to Marin County residents.

name: BioMarin
description: Rare disease biopharmaceutical company headquartered in San Rafael, developing enzyme replacement and gene therapies.

name: County of Marin
description: County government providing health, human services, parks, and public safety for Marin County's 260,000 residents.

name: Marin Community Clinics
description: Federally qualified health center providing primary care, dental, and behavioral health to underserved communities in Marin County.

name: Starbucks
description: Global coffeehouse chain operating hundreds of locations across the Bay Area, one of the region's largest food service employers.

name: Allied Universal
description: Allied Universal provides security services and solutions, including security personnel, consulting and investigations, and systems integration.

name: University of California, Los Angeles
description: UCLA is a public research university offering a wide range of undergraduate and graduate programs, and conducting extensive research.

name: Cedars-Sinai
description: Cedars-Sinai is a non-profit academic healthcare organization providing patient care, research, and medical education.

name: Dominos Pizza
description: Domino's Pizza is an American multinational pizza restaurant chain, offering pizza, pasta, and other menu items for delivery and carryout.

name: Northrop Grumman
description: Northrop Grumman is a global aerospace and defense technology company, specializing in advanced systems and solutions.

name: University of Southern California
description: USC is a private research university offering diverse academic programs and contributing significantly to research and innovation.

name: Kroger
description: Kroger is one of the largest supermarket chains in the United States, operating various retail food and drug stores.

name: SpaceX
description: SpaceX designs, manufactures, and launches advanced rockets and spacecraft, with a goal of enabling human life on other planets.

name: CVS Health
description: CVS Health is a healthcare company that owns CVS Pharmacy, a retail pharmacy chain, and CVS Caremark, a pharmacy benefits manager.
